# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-a
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service-a
  port:
    port: 8080
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-a-authz
spec:
  server: service-a
  destinations:
  - port: 8080
    services:
    - service-b
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-b
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service-b
  port:
    port: 8080
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-b-authz
spec:
  server: service-b
  destinations:
  - port: 8080
    services:
    - service-a
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: service-a-sa
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: service-b-sa
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-a-sa-authz
spec:
  server: service-a
  destinations:
  - port: 8080
    serviceAccounts:
    - service-b-sa
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-b-sa-authz
spec:
  server: service-b
  destinations:
  - port: 8080
    serviceAccounts:
    - service-a-sa
